title: Infosys is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Infosys is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Infosys has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys:
Infosys is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys!
